title: 440kg enriched uranium (60%) stays in Tehran during 60-day talks — nuclear deferred
snippet: The MoU leaves Iran's 440kg nuclear stockpile (enriched to 60%, stored in a mountain facility) untouched during the 60-day follow-on talks. Trump acknowledged the deal only 'conceptually' addresses nuclear material. Nuclear weapons-grade is 90%, but 60% enrichment makes the final step much faster. This is the most significant concession in the nuclear dimension — uranium stays as leverage.
tag_reason: 440kg 우라늄 현상 유지 조항 최초 구체적 보도 — 핵 쟁점의 60일 유예 확인
